title: Lab Technician
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

HMING TECHNOLOGY (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD. founded in 2023 and headquartered in Techplace, Singapore, is the Southeast Asian branch of Hming Technology (Jiangsu) Co., Ltd. (China). The Singapore entity focuses on the production, testing, final assembly, and regional distribution of gas and liquid chromatography columns and related consumables. The company manufactures and distributes high-performance chromatographic products and acts as an authorized distributor for leading European brands such as SEPACHROM (Italy, HPLC columns), MEGA (Italy, GC columns), and DR.Masich (Germany, HPLC packings and accessories). With strong R&D and manufacturing support from its parent company in China, the Singapore branch serves as: Product Testing & Quality Control Center – Performing comprehensive testing for HPLC and GC columns to meet international standards. Final Packaging & Regional Distribution Hub – Handling labeling, export, and logistics for Southeast Asia and China. Technical Support & Customer Service Center – Providing fast technical response and custom solutions for research institutes, pharmaceutical companies, and testing labs. Brand and Market Development Unit – Managing the regional representation and promotion of European chromatography brands. Guided by the motto “Precision in Separation, Global Service,” HMING TECHNOLOGY (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD. aims to become a key chromatography solutions provider in Southeast Asia, integrating European technology excellence with Chinese manufacturing efficiency.

Job Summary

You will support laboratory testing and analysis using Gas Chromatography and Liquid Chromatography / High Performance Liquid Chromatography systems to ensure product quality and compliance with standards.

Responsibilities

  • Conduct routine and specialized laboratory tests following standard operating procedures (SOPs) to produce accurate analytical results
  • Prepare, label, and process samples including raw materials, in-process, and finished products to support testing workflows
  • Perform quality control and analytical tests to verify compliance with product specifications and quality standards
  • Operate, maintain, and troubleshoot chromatography and other laboratory equipment to ensure reliable performance
  • Calibrate instruments and perform basic equipment checks to maintain testing accuracy
  • Maintain accurate laboratory records, logs, and reports to document test results and procedures
  • Follow laboratory safety protocols and comply with Good Laboratory Practices (GLP) and quality standards such as ISO and QA/QC
  • Manage laboratory inventory by ordering consumables and supporting housekeeping to maintain an organized work environment
  • Support internal and external audits and participate in continuous improvement initiatives to enhance laboratory operations

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Diploma in Chemistry Technology, Biotechnology, Applied Sciences, Medical Laboratory Technology, or related field
  • At least 1 year of laboratory experience supporting analytical testing and quality control
  • Knowledge of laboratory safety procedures, equipment handling, and quality management systems
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office and accurate data recording practices
  • Experience operating analytical instruments and performing quality control tests
  • Strong attention to detail and organizational skills to ensure precise and reliable test outcomes
  • Effective communication and teamwork skills to collaborate with colleagues and support laboratory functions
  • Self-motivated with a positive attitude and willingness to follow SOPs and learn new procedures
